description: Classed as an oriental fragrance, the aramis Classic for men from Aramis was launched in 2008. Created for the man as fearless as the irreverant flask. The fragrance features caraway, leather, myrtle, amber, patchouli, cinnamon, oakmoss, juniper, galbanum, jasmine, citruses, caraway, cloves and sage.Quantity: 110 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
